name: Debt-to-income ceiling
description: Debt-to-income ratio must not exceed 0.43 for any unsecured loan.
regulatory_basis: CFPB Qualified Mortgage rule (43% DTI cap, applied here to all unsecured)

name: Minimum FICO for unsecured
description: FICO score must be at least 620 for any unsecured loan.

name: Minimum FICO for auto
description: FICO score must be at least 580 for secured auto loans.

name: Minimum verified annual income
description: Verified annual income must be at least $30,000.

name: Minimum employment tenure
description: Applicant must have at least 1 year of continuous employment.

name: Unsecured amount cap
description: Unsecured loans above $100,000 require manual senior-underwriter review (treated as deny in this demo).

name: Mortgage DTI ceiling
description: Debt-to-income ratio must not exceed 0.36 for mortgage products.

name: Recent default exclusion
description: Applicants with a default in the last 24 months are ineligible.
